name: augustssons.se
message: Augustssons Beslagsindustri AB is a family business founded in 1946. The father and uncle of the current owner Sivert Augustsson, Alvar and Sven Augustsson, were engaged in the production of carbines and fittings. Sivert took over the company in 1986, after which the company switched to contract manufacturing. Today, the company employs around 40 people and has 4,500 m² of production and storage space.
